sessionStart.bash: PY=$(./cstrafe/bin/python -c 'import sys; print(sys.executable)' 2>/dev/null) && if [ -z "$PY" ]; then echo "cstrafe venv not found" && exit 1; fi && echo "Using interpreter: $PY"
sessionStart.powershell: $py = & .\cstrafe\Scripts\python -c "import sys; print(sys.executable)" 2>$null; if (-not $py) { Write-Error "cstrafe venv not found"; exit 1 }; Write-Output "Using interpreter: $py"
